'''taladha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideworking|hideworking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideworking|hideworking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| taladha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tælædhæth|tælædhæth]] || [[word:tælædhæj|tælædhæj]] || [[word:tælædhæsh|tælædhæsh]] || [[word:tælædhæ|tælædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:talaladhath|talaladhath]] || [[word:talaladhaj|talaladhaj]] || [[word:talaladhash|talaladhash]] || [[word:talaladha|talaladha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:taladhath|taladhath]] || [[word:taladhaj|taladhaj]] || [[word:taladhash|taladhash]] || [[word:taladha|taladha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:talafdhath|talafdhath]] || [[word:talafdhaj|talafdhaj]] || [[word:talafdhash|talafdhash]] || [[word:talafdhaf|talafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:taladhatha|taladhatha]] || [[word:taladhaja|taladhaja]] || [[word:taladhasha|taladhasha]] || [[word:taladhaka|taladhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taladhath|taladhath]] || [[word:taladhaj|taladhaj]] || [[word:taladhash|taladhash]] || [[word:taladha|taladha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:taladhathal|taladhathal]] || [[word:taladhajal|taladhajal]] || [[word:taladhashal|taladhashal]] || [[word:taladhakal|taladhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:taladhathatha|taladhathatha]] || [[word:taladhajaja|taladhajaja]] || [[word:taladhashasha|taladhashasha]] || [[word:taladhaka|taladhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:taladhathan|taladhathan]] || [[word:taladhajan|taladhajan]] || [[word:taladhashan|taladhashan]] || [[word:taladhakan|taladhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:taladhathaoro|taladhathaoro]] || [[word:taladhajaoro|taladhajaoro]] || [[word:taladhashaoro|taladhashaoro]] || [[word:taladhakaoro|taladhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
